sutta: the buddha said verily monks that among without the peace of concentration in high degree without attaining to calm without winning 1 pointedness shall have part in the many psychic powers being 1 he becomes many being many he becomes 1 he reaches in body even as far as the brahma world that cannot be shall hear with the purified deva ear surpassing man's sounds of devas and men far and near that cannot be shall know by mind compassing mind the thoughts of other folk other persons the passionate as such the unemancipated as such that cannot be shall call to mind many a previous life 1 birth 2 birds etc that cannot be shall see with the deva i the faring of men that cannot be shall enter and abide in liberation by mind liberation by wisdom asava that cannot be that's the end of the suta
commentary: here the buddha is saying without the peace or concentration in high degree without attaining to calm without winning 1 pointedness a person cannot have the various psychic powers and cannot attain liberation by mind and liberation by wisdom asaba free so here again we find the importance of samadhi or the chanas being stressed chanas are necessary for psychic power and that's why i just now mentioned that the cause of his psychic power is sati patana which just shows that sati katana is synonymous with janas in angutta nikaya 1 of the sutas we read earlier it is stated that sutapana [Music] must possess perfect samadhi perfect concentration that means the jar nasa is another suta dish um which is from which it is quite clear that jana is unnecessary now the next few times
